subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-21 in Port Said to some Baha'is from Azerbaijan
subcodes.first_line: Although you all have waited very long, praise be to God that the circumstances for us to meet were brought about. I, too, very much wished to meet with you… It is not yet apparent, but in time the gift that God has given Iran and the Iranian people will become clear.
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر چند شماها خیلی انتظار کشیدید ولکن الحمد لله اسباب فراهم آمد که ملاقات شد من... الحمد لله آمدید و بزیارت روضهٴ مبارکه مشرف شدید روی و موی را بتراب عتبهٴ مقدسه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Shrines and Holy places, @suffering; rejection of Christ
